subcodes.first_line: O pure and assured leaf! In this age when the winds of tests and trials have encompassed the world and tempests [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه مطمئنه در چنین عهدی که اریاح امتحان جهانرا احاطه نموده و طوفان
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
